CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to CRC 3.1385. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Full And Complete Responses To Supplemental Discovery Set Two
Off Calendar Aug-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PAULINE CONWAY'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Full And Complete Responses To Supplemental Discovery Set Two.

Defendant Conway's unopposed motion is granted. Plaintiff shall serve complete responses to all of the supplemental discovery by September 14. 2018. Prevailing party to submit form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312 by email to Judge Pro Tem Bruce Highman at bruce.highman@highmanlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-23-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendant Pauline Conway'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Full And Complete Responses To Supplemental Discovery
Off Calendar Sep-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adoptd its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT PAULINE CONWAY'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Full And Complete Responses To Supplemental Discovery. Based on the motion papers available and Plaintiff's Statement of Non-Opposition, Defendant's motion is granted. Plaintiff shall respond to Defendant's Supplemental Demand for Inspection and Production of Documents, Set. No. One and Supplemental Interrogatories, Set No. One, within fourteen (14) days of this order. The prevailing party shall submit a proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Stephanie Krmpotic; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Full And Complete Responses To Supplemental Discovery
Off Calendar Sep-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Set for hearing on the Discovery Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 6, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT PAULINE CONWAY'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Full And Complete Responses To Supplemental Discovery is continued to September 19, 2017 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. in the discovery department (room 301). All parties shall immediately provide courtesy copies of their filings with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date per SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
